pages.title: Water, by moonlight
pages.text: A cauldron left outside during rain on a full moon (or similar lunar phase) gathers $(item)Lunar Water$() instead of ordinary rainwater. Dip a glass bottle to collect.

pages.title: Lunar Water Bottle
pages.text: Drink to clear negative status effects and apply $(6)Regeneration II$() for a short burst. A good panic button during a $(l:events/blood_moon)Blood Moon$() — it's easier to make than a potion and triggers immediately.
